text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR>, solches mit einem dridten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn <PERSNAME>Samuel Haag</PERSNAME> dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am <PLACENAME>Spahlenberg</PLACENAME> zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":3,"explanation":"1) Replaced the corrupted character sequence \"\\u221a\\u00fc\" (√ü) with the correct German character \"ß\" in \"daß\". 2) Added a <PERSNAME> tag around \"Samuel Haag\", the bookbinder mentioned as the contact person. 3) Added a <PLACENAME> tag around \"Spahlenberg\", the location reference. The existing <BIBL>, <TITLE>, and <AUTHOR> tags were well-formed and retained as-is."}
